case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. ROYTMAN, ALEXANDEZS

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, ALEXANDEZS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, ALEXANDEZS $4,032.82 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,115.82
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, ALEXANDEZS
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT HEARING SET FOR AUG-12-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED JUL-24-1996, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, ALEXANDEZS

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF AUG-12-1996 GRANT EXCEPT FOR $35.00 TO BE WITHELD EACH PAY DAY; LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 EARNINGS HELD TO THE DEBTOR & 1/2 TO THE CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,455.06 AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, ALEXANDEZS
